email.subject: @general.directorr — a tool built for people who direct
email.body:
Hi,

The @general.directorr account has a clear point of view — and 91k followers means the audience has responded to it. I'm reaching out because FrameCoach is built for exactly the person that account suggests: someone who thinks about directing as a craft, not just content creation.

FrameCoach is a cinematography coach app that connects to a DSLR or mirrorless via phone, reads the scene in real time, and recommends precise settings for ISO, aperture, shutter speed, white balance and framing. You describe the shot in plain English. One tap to apply. It's the kind of tool a director reaches for when the technical side of the camera is slowing down the creative decision-making.

If that resonates with what you're making, the full picture is at framecoach.io.

Melusi
